steps.title: Recognize how magical realism creates juxtaposition
steps.content: The passage defines magical realism as antirealistic devices “deployed in an otherwise realistic mode.” Realism is the dominant framework, and folklore elements disrupt it from within. The underlined claim says My Name Is Red has this same quality—folklore disrupts the realism to create a juxtaposition.

steps.title: Match the mechanism to the answer choices
steps.content: D captures the mechanism directly: the “realistic plot” is “repeatedly and productively disrupted by the presence of imagery and situations drawn from Turkish folklore.” The word “productively” emphasizes the disruption is intentional—folklore reshaping realism from within. The other three either describe folklore as influence without disruption or suggest alternation rather than embedded disruption. That matches choice D — D is correct.
